parts.text: Adoption is the whole game. A rival gate takes a YAML afternoon. mergegate takes one line.
Add one line to your pull-request workflow, and every agent PR gets gated and commented automatically.

One uses line. On an agent's pull request the action runs the gate, keyed on the author, and posts the verdict as a comment. Missing spec and a broken test — blocked. Fixed and referenced — clear to merge.
mergegate. One line in front of main. From deemwar.

captions.text: One uses: line — no YAML afternoon, no migration.
Agent PR → the gate comments the verdict → ❌ BLOCKED.
Fixed + spec referenced → ✅ clear to merge.
